title: Sapporo, Hokkaido — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]

Overview

Sapporo is a city in Hokkaido with a population of 1,976,000. Hokkaido’s vibrant capital famous for the Snow Festival, beer, ramen, and year-round outdoor activities.
